issues: Absence of film grain or noise texture overlay, which would enhance the cinematic feel required for a game page.
Overall flatness due to minimal depth elements beyond the text glow.
Placeholder content ('Glowing Materia') is visible, indicating incompleteness and detracting from a finished product feel.
Lack of an atmospheric background image in the hero section, making it feel empty and less immersive.
Overall layout is too static and centered, not dynamic enough for a premium game companion site.
strengths: Excellent thematic typography with a custom display font for titles and logo.
Excellent use of custom display typography with a thematic neon glow effect.
Clean and well-aligned layout for the visible content.
Effective and consistent use of the neon green accent color.
The neon green accent on a dark background is highly effective and perfectly matches the Final Fantasy VII aesthetic.
specific_improvements: Replace all placeholder content with actual, detailed information and imagery relevant to the section's title.
Apply a subtle film grain or noise texture overlay across the entire page to enhance depth and immersion.
Add a subtle film grain or noise texture overlay across the page to enhance immersion and cinematic quality.
Integrate a full-bleed, atmospheric background image (e.g., a subtle Mako reactor or cosmic scene) with a dark overlay to maintain text readability.
Integrate a high-quality, full-bleed atmospheric background image (e.g., Midgar skyline) into the hero section with a subtle dark overlay for text readability.
